title: AI Ticket Categorizer
description: Build an AI agent that categorizes support tickets. Define a Categorizer agent that returns { category, priority, suggested_action }. Tickets table stores the result. POST /api/tickets receives { subject, description } and returns the categorized ticket.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority

# Define a Categorizer agent
# POST /api/tickets endpoint
